scripts.build: npm run build --prefix packages/pptx-glimpse-renderer && npm run build --prefix packages/pptx-glimpse
scripts.lint: eslint packages/*/src/ vrt/ scripts/ bench/ e2e/
scripts.lint:fix: eslint packages/*/src/ vrt/ scripts/ bench/ e2e/ --fix
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix packages/pptx-glimpse-renderer && npm run typecheck --prefix packages/pptx-glimpse
scripts.vrt:snapshot:update: docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/workspace -v pptx-glimpse-snapshot-vrt-nm:/workspace/node_modules pptx-glimpse-snapshot-vrt bash /workspace/vrt/snapshot/docker-run.sh npx tsx vrt/snapshot/create-fixtures.ts && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/workspace -v pptx-glimpse-snapshot-vrt-nm:/workspace/node_modules pptx-glimpse-snapshot-vrt bash /workspace/vrt/snapshot/docker-run.sh npx tsx vrt/snapshot/update-snapshots.ts
scripts.vrt:lo:update: npm run vrt:lo:docker-build && npm run vrt:lo:fixtures && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/workspace pptx-glimpse-vrt bash /workspace/vrt/libreoffice/update_snapshots.sh
scripts.demo:build: npm run build && cd demo && npm install && npm run build
